name: Eric Trump
subject: Over easy or scrambled?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
My father would love to meet you during this historic year... |
---
| | | | | | | | [](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=86156fb81426dc51c66b2801c4232e00d4695cef22b8f84bd97c486a74fe6488ef40ab118cca72f3f104a1fca89254f1)
---

Peter,

We've had a historic inaugural year together, and I know my father would love to meet you before it comes to a close.

**President Trump will be in New York City on December 2, 2017, where he 'll be having breakfast with some of our closest friends and supporters. **

---
| **[All I ask is that you make a contribution of $3 or more to be automatically entered to win.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=86156fb81426dc516144a5016e0ee360b756fea502c0b8edb95e0ad1f4b8f220ff69539a69c88fe03ae9ba100b89fe55)**
[JOIN PRESIDENT TRUMP FOR BREAKFAST](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=86156fb81426dc51c305e75083f4c8c579f7f8b6b4c0832de5fbf988e4e2e749122bb12d31877b2436e60c179c655226)
**To honor his historic first year in office, no contribution is needed for your chance to win this once-in-a-lifetime opportunity to join President Trump for breakfast in his home city.**

_Just head here to add your name to the raffle before November 27:_
**[ENTER TO WIN](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=86156fb81426dc51f9f4e3a434fb7577cb8fe8de8bb0ab3f06ca8aab33f74bccba3d7a6f391d7041374e895f9ddb431f)**
This is the last sweepstakes of 2017 - and your last chance to say you got to meet the President during his inaugural year.

**[Contribute $3 or more to be automatically entered to win.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=86156fb81426dc51155e5195eb783454b07208bb90eef085241aaac7595cb525a372c2593999e660a02c84e3e4d69627)**

Best of luck and hope to see you there!

[](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=86156fb81426dc51b38aeb6f85572c5d57fbd5044ce7b430e0683675919544a6acdc8c2848e9c61d1578356610ac3dc4)
Eric Trump

**[ENTER TO WIN](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=86156fb81426dc51f9beefc4e422d5e0ef46d9192aeb94de3bb9ee1b6bc703ed868821b7d09e2402976ba57968edac0b)**
---

NO PURCHASE, PAYMENT, OR CONTRIBUTION NECESSARY TO ENTER OR WIN. Contributing will not improve your chances of winning. Void where prohibited. You may enter by contributing to Trump Make America Great Again by clicking [here](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=86156fb81426dc51767a15d6b03ec7f8d616aaf0b0007f7cc30f8c469b490aa7e1535d708207e608f709a05003cdf4d5) Alternatively, you may enter without contributing by clicking [here ](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=86156fb81426dc51e210c3ffdfbae6f309f9eeb442124ed0e0264981d65b50f983a5c8e0309e7c640e3d55b7e6058389) Entries must be received between November 8, 2017 at 12:00 a.m. Eastern Time and November 27, 2017 at 11:59 p.m. Eastern Time. Odds of winning depend on the number of eligible entries received. One (1) winners will receive round-trip transportation and accommodations and tickets to attend the December 2, 2017 Holiday In Manhattan Breakfast in New York, NY(approximate retail value $3000). The Promotion is open only to U.S. citizens, or lawful permanent U.S. residents who are legal residents (green card holders) of the 50 United States, Puerto Rico, and the District of Columbia and are at least 18 years of age (or the age of majority under applicable law). Winner must be 18 or older (or of majority under applicable law) and meet other requirements as described in the Official Rules. Promotion subject to Official Rules and additional restrictions on eligibility may apply. Visit [here](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=86156fb81426dc51a64561fb8dcefce6f6fdaafcec4fa59905c34d8feea48e2a32f21458336a0aec638d0bcc29599306) for full details and Official Rules. Sponsor: Trump Make America Great Again Committee, 138 Conant Street, 2nd Floor, Beverly, MA 01915. Contributions to the Trump Make America Great Again Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J. Trump for President, Inc. and the Republican National Committee. You are receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com
Trump Make America Great Again Committee, 138 Conant Street, 2nd Floor, Beverly, MA 01915

We believe this is an important way to reach our grassroots supporters with the most up-to-date information regarding the efforts of the Trump Make America Great Again Committee and President Trump, and we're glad you're on our team. It's because of grassroots supporters like you that we will Make America Great Again, and we appreciate your support. Thank you for all that you do!

[Privacy Policy](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=86156fb81426dc519e22e94fecf95a8813ded10a09557c1ae923d126661ed4088c9868095847e56b9ba882eaa991bd2c) | [Unsubscribe](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/unsub_center.aspx?qs=2d1444c0c3dd22aba5cce22f653b2e13d3990bdeda550eb9f45d1d0f1397d64ceed99d7f125862c38a56260cd8152852) | [Update Profile](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/profile_center.aspx?qs=2d1444c0c3dd22ab291494658eff68202d789f94509d48467190ba898b38f60804d9430fca7720e7942c1bfa6b691d6b)
---

name: Donnelly for Indiana
subject: Year in review (need your input)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
We're already gearing up for the long road ahead of us in 2018 and putting together a strategy memo for Joe. |
---

| | | It's been a challenging year, Peter. We saw extremist cabinet appointments like Betsy DeVos, repeated attempts to repeal the Affordable Care Act, and unconstitutional executive orders designed to tear our country apart.

How did we respond? We launched our campaign for re-election, toured across the state of Indiana talking with Hoosiers about what matters most to them, and cheered on Joe as he protected our health care and opposed policies and appointments that would hurt Hoosier families.

We're already gearing up for the long road ahead of us in 2018 and putting together a strategy memo for Joe.

This campaign is powered by people, not special interests, and your opinion is important to us.

Will you take our short survey and tell us:

| **Do you support Joe 's campaign for re-election?**

**[YES](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2552/7377f838/357ed171/51fba3d5/404059013/VEsH/ "https://www.surveymonkey.com/r/8B3K8YN")** **[NO](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2552/7377f838/357ed171/51fba3d5/404059013/VEsE/ "https://www.surveymonkey.com/r/8B3K8YN")**
---
Thanks,

Team Donnelly

| [**CONTRIBUTE**](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2552/7377f838/357ed171/51fba3d4/404059013/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jd-donate?refcode=20171118db&amount=25")
---

|
---

Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
---

P.O. Box 891, Indianapolis, IN 46206
[Unsubscribe](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2552/7377f838/357ed171/51fba3d7/404059013/VEsC/ "http://action.joeforindiana.com/unsubscribe")

name: did-you-see@dscc.org
subject: Sign now: Stand with Sherrod Brown in this fight
body:
Senator Sherrod Brown called out the GOP for trying to pass tax breaks for the wealthy, paid for by everyone else. And the GOP tried to shut him down. Add your name to stand with Sherrod in this fight >>
---
[](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954d3d1/2b07114c/c9f84eff/73176389/2291466138/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVkdTVkpUVkU1QlRVVWxKUT09IjoiIn0=/ "http://action.dscc.org/page/s/stop-gop-tax-scam?source=PT-20171119-DidYouSee_DS-ProsHV&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=")
Team,

Democratic Senator Sherrod Brown called out the GOP last week for backing a tax plan that gives massive breaks to the wealthy WHILE making middle-class families pay more -- and he touched a nerve.

**The GOP chairman told Brown he was done "allowing him" to "spout off" on this "bullcrap"\-- but Brown didn't back down.**

**Because Sherrod Brown had the facts on his side. Because the CBO backs up these claims.** Brown kept going because our Democratic Senators stand up for middle-class families _no matter what_. And they need us in this fight more than ever, team.

[**Stand with Sherrod Brown and Senate Democrats as they fight to stop the GOP tax scam. Add your name now to oppose tax breaks for the ultra-wealthy -- paid for by everyone else.**](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954d3d1/2b07114c/c9f84eff/73176389/2291466138/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVkdTVkpUVkU1QlRVVWxKUT09IjoiIn0=/ "http://action.dscc.org/page/s/stop-gop-tax-scam?source=PT-20171119-DidYouSee_DS-ProsHV&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=")

This is going to be a tough fight, team. The head of Mitch McConnell's super PAC already said that they will spend big money defending GOP Senators who fall in line and vote for this tax scam.

We don't have shady right-wing super PACs fighting to stop their disastrous tax plan -- but we do have you. And right now, we're counting on you to show Republicans the consequences they'll face in 2018 for raising taxes on middle-class families.

**Senate Democrats are fighting their hardest to defend working families. Add your name right now to show that just like Sherrod Brown, you won 't back down in the tough fight to stop the GOP tax scam:**

[**http://www.dscc.org/stand-with-democrats-to-stop-the-tax-scam**](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954d3d1/2b07114c/c9f84eff/73176389/2291466138/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVkdTVkpUVkU1QlRVVWxKUT09IjoiIn0=/ "http://action.dscc.org/page/s/stop-gop-tax-scam?source=PT-20171119-DidYouSee_DS-ProsHV&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=")

Thank you,

Team DSCC

**A quick note on donations, team:**

When we say that we're counting on grassroots donors to protect Senate Democrats, we're not kidding. In fact, a full 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We don't have the Koch brothers in our corner -- we have you. And every gift you give the DSCC is a gift we use to propel our Senate candidates to victory.

[**Contribute**](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-democrats?refcode=DPE-20171119-DidYouSee_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954d3d1/2b07114c/c9f84eff/7317638b/2291466138/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954d3d1/2b07114c/c9f84eff/7317638a/2291466138/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954d3d1/2b07114c/c9f84eff/73176385/2291466138/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.
---
